都.en: already (emphatic with time, as in 都十点了)

想.en: to think; to want; to miss

正在.en: right in the middle of (emphatic progressive)

还是.en: still; in the end; or (in questions)

起来.en: rise up; begin to; evaluative marker

山水.en: mountains and water; landscape; landscape painting

甚至.en: even; going so far as to

文化大革命.en: the Cultural Revolution — what reform responded to

香火.en: incense fire; the living link between temples

辛亥革命.en: the 1911 Revolution that ended the Qing

不妨.en: might as well; no harm in

不仅.en: not merely (formal pair for 而且)

不如.en: not as good as; better to

不是…而是.en: it's not X but rather Y

不用.en: no need to; don't have to

才.en: then and only then; only now; talent

差不多.en: about the same; more or less

出家.en: to leave home; enter monastic life

出神.en: to enter trance; to be rapt

处于.en: to be in (a state or situation)

处置.en: to handle; to dispose of; the construction name

倒不如.en: it would actually be better to (colloquial)

点火.en: to ignite; to light a fire

改.en: to correct; to revise; to alter

革.en: to reform; leather; to strip away

根本.en: at all, fundamentally (in neg: not at all)

关注.en: to pay attention to; to follow

过去.en: the past; to pass; to go over

毫不.en: not at all, not in the least

好不容易.en: with great difficulty; finally after much effort

何必.en: why bother to; there's no need to

换.en: to exchange; to swap; to replace

加上.en: in addition; plus; adding to this

江青.en: Jiang Qing, Mao's wife, Gang of Four leader

讲.en: to speak; to explain; to lecture

降.en: to descend; to lower; to fall

进香.en: to make a pilgrimage offering incense

来自.en: to come from; to originate from

李自成.en: rebel leader who took Beijing in 1644

历史决议.en: Resolution on Party History (1981 official verdict)

鲁迅.en: Lu Xun, greatest May Fourth writer

落脚.en: to find lodging; to settle in

命苦.en: hard fate; to have a bitter lot in life

念.en: to think of; to miss; to read aloud

宁缺毋滥.en: better to lack than to have inferior

上坟.en: to visit and offer at the grave

上山下乡.en: up to mountains, down to countryside (policy)

社稷.en: the state; altars of land and grain

甚至于.en: going so far as to (emphatic formal)

四旧.en: the Four Olds (ideas, culture, customs, habits)

随笔.en: casual essay; jottings as you go

孙中山.en: Sun Yat-sen, father of the republic

所在.en: where something lies; the essence of

太平.en: great peace — the classical political ideal

万一.en: just in case; if by chance

下来.en: come down; slow to a stop

湘军.en: the Xiang Army — Zeng Guofan's force

心得.en: insight from experience; what one gained

心学.en: Learning of the Mind (Wang Yangming's school)

崖山之战.en: Battle of Yamen, final Song defeat

阳宅.en: yang dwelling = home for the living

易.en: change; easy; the Book of Changes

永乐帝.en: third Ming emperor, builder of Beijing

原来.en: originally; so that's how it is

袁世凯.en: military strongman who hijacked the republic

遭受.en: to suffer; to be subjected to

着落.en: a place to land; a resolution

中国梦.en: the China Dream — Xi Jinping's successor framing

重新.en: anew; all over again from the beginning

转.en: to turn; to shift; to transfer

做.en: to do; to make; to work
